item.title: Markets Rise, But Svarnim Trade Udyog Ltd Slides to All-Time Low Amid Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Shares of Svarnim Trade Udyog Ltd, a micro-cap company in the Garments & Apparels sector, have declined to an all-time low of Rs. 8.35 on 15 Apr 2026, marking a significant milestone in the stock’s extended downward trajectory. The stock’s performance continues to lag behind both its sector and broader market indices, reflecting persistent challenges in its financial and operational metrics. Time: 6 minutes ago

item.title: Ajax Engineering Ltd Surges 7.2% to Day's High of Rs 501 — Outperforms Sector by 3.39 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.61% on 15 Apr 2026, yet Ajax Engineering Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.2% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 501. This 3.39-percentage-point outperformance over its sector peers in Engineering - Industrial Equipments signals a distinctly stock-specific momentum shift. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Mrs Bectors Food Specialities Ltd Surges 7.05% to Day's High of Rs 201.85 — Outperforms FMCG Sector by 4.83 Percentage Points

item.title: Wipro Ltd. Rallies 3.05% and Approaches 100 DMA Resistance — A Key Technical Test Ahead
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.61% on 15 Apr 2026, yet Wipro Ltd. outperformed with a 3.05% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 209. This 1.44-percentage-point outperformance signals a stock-specific strength amid a broadly positive market environment. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd Surges 5.1% to Day's High of Rs 7535.5 — Outperforms Sector by 2.64 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.59% on 15 Apr 2026, yet Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd outpaced both the benchmark and its sector, rising 5.1% to an intraday peak of Rs 7535.5. This 2.64-percentage-point outperformance over the IT - Software sector’s 2.53% gain signals a distinctly stock-specific momentum shift rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Fino Payments Bank Ltd Opens 7.98% Higher Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: Fino Payments Bank Ltd witnessed a robust start to the trading session on 15 Apr 2026, opening with a notable gap up of 7.98%, reflecting positive momentum in the financial technology sector despite mixed technical indicators and a challenging recent performance trend. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Inox Wind Ltd Surges 7.47% to Day's High of Rs 93.84 — Outperforms Sector by 0.26 Percentage Points

item.title: Aspira Pathlab & Diagnostics Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 49 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline in Aspira Pathlab & Diagnostics Ltd has pushed the stock to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 49 on 15 Apr 2026, marking a significant 39.5% drop from its 52-week high of Rs 81. This comes amid heightened volatility and a continuation of recent losses, despite some contrasting financial signals. Time: 43 minutes ago

item.title: 156.72% Stock Return, 82.9% Profit Growth: What's Driving Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd's Multibagger Rerating?
item.description: A 156.72% stock return in one year. An 82.9% growth in net profit over the same period. The gap between those two numbers — roughly 74 percentage points — is driven by the market's willingness to pay more for each rupee of Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd's earnings. That willingness is the story behind this multibagger rerating. Time: 48 minutes ago

item.title: KRN Heat Exchanger and Refrigeration Ltd Surges 7.61% to Day's High of Rs 1127 — Outperforms Sector by 3.45 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.56% on 15 Jun 2026, yet KRN Heat Exchanger and Refrigeration Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.61% gain, reaching a fresh 52-week and all-time high of Rs 1127. This 3.45-percentage-point outperformance over its sector underscores a distinctly stock-specific momentum rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 52 minutes ago
